metadata.name: Premium Gold Balloon Arch Kit - 150 Pieces
metadata.description: Create stunning gold balloon arches for weddings and upscale events. Includes 150 premium latex balloons in gold and white with metallic finish. Complete kit with balloon strip and pump.

metadata.name: Tropical Flamingo Party Pack - Serves 24
metadata.description: Complete tropical flamingo party set including plates cups napkins tablecloth centerpieces and flamingo decorations. Perfect for summer pool parties and luaus.

metadata.name: Rustic Mason Jar Centerpiece Kit - Set of 6
metadata.description: Charming rustic mason jar centerpiece kit perfect for weddings barn parties and country-themed events. Includes 6 jars with burlap wraps LED candles and artificial flowers.

metadata.name: Superhero Costume Accessories Bundle - 12 Pack
metadata.description: Party favor bundle with 12 superhero capes and masks in assorted colors. Perfect for birthday parties costume events and school activities.

metadata.name: Glow in the Dark Party Supplies Mega Pack
metadata.description: Ultimate glow party pack with 100 glow sticks 50 glow bracelets UV reactive plates cups and tablecloth plus blacklight balloons. Serves 25 guests.

metadata.name: Vintage Lace Table Runner - 12 Pack White
metadata.description: Elegant white lace table runners for weddings tea parties and formal events. Pack of 12 runners each 14 inches wide by 108 inches long. Reusable and machine washable.

metadata.name: Fiesta Taco Bar Decorating Kit
metadata.description: Complete taco bar setup with festive papel picado banners cactus centerpieces fiesta signs and colorful serveware. Perfect for Cinco de Mayo or Mexican themed parties.

metadata.name: Baby Shower Elephant Theme Bundle - Blue
metadata.description: Adorable blue elephant baby shower set with plates cups napkins banner cake topper and favor boxes. Coordinates perfectly for baby boy celebrations. Serves 16.

metadata.name: Halloween Haunted House Decoration Set
metadata.description: Transform your space into a haunted house with this complete decoration set. Includes spider webs giant spiders hanging ghosts creepy cloth and LED strobe light.

metadata.name: Graduation Photo Booth Props - Class of 2025
metadata.description: Celebrate the Class of 2025 with this 30-piece photo booth prop set. Includes graduation caps diplomas speech bubbles and fun signs in black and gold.
